Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Gross in Propria Persona.

Mr. Gross stated that he sent notice to the Franchise Tax Board, that he can not find a copy of the letter but that it was timely, that any refunds will go into the John O'Connor Trust and that any taxes that might come due will come out of the John O'Connor Trust. Mr. Gross also stated that he has no problem with obtaining a bond and that he waives his extraordinary fee request. The Court ordered a $1,000,000.00 bond. The Petition for Final Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer, Demurrer To Amended Will Contest, And Memorandum In Support Of Demurrer To Amended Will Contest
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Dogulas Johnson (Respondent/Moving Party). Erica Shepard for Patricia Rice (Contestant).

Mr. Dougherty requested for a ruling on the Request for Judical Notice and presented oral argument in support of his position. The Court denied the Request for Judical Notice.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the inconsistency or consistency of the Holographic Wills, that the Holographic Wills must be read together and that they did not revoke the prior will. After hearing the argument, the Court confirmed its Tentative Ruling. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the third cause of action. Overruled as to the first cause of action and the fifth cause of action. Contestant must filed her Amended Contest by October 11, 2013. Order signed in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-11-294526 Estate of Alfred John O'Connor; PTR-11-294767 Amendment and Restatement of Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Living Trust; PTR-11-294830 The Martin Francis Schram Revocable Living Trust

Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Douglas Johnson. Erica Shepard for Patricia Rice. Stacie Nelson for St. Jude Children's Research Foundation. Roger Gross (Special Administrator) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shepard informed the Court that she filed a will contest this morning. Ms. Nelson stated that she will also be filing a will contest. All three matters were continued to September 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a referal to trial in Dept. 206, status on a referral to mediation and status on discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar May-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Dougherty for Douglas Johnson. Roger Gross in Properia Persona. Erica Shepard for Patricia Rice.

Mr. Dougherty stated his notice for today's hearing failed to indicate that the petitioner was requesting limited IAEA powers, spoke of four wills and asked that all wills be submitted to probate, requested that the Court consider granting independent powers to Roger Gross and stated that the request special notice by Charles Tunnelle was filed after the petition was filed. Ms. Shepard made it clear that the Rice family potentially owns half of the real property and that it needs to be appraised. Mr. Dougherty stated that Mr. Gross would not have any power over the real property and in the event that he would need to use any funds from the estate for repairs to the real property, he would have to do so with written agreement by all beneficiaries. Ms. Shepard withdraws her objection to Mr. Gross being appointed as special administrator. The Accounting Petition is approved (subject to review of written order) and the Petition for Letters of Special Administration with general powers is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case numbers PTR-11-294767 The Alfred John O'Connor Trust and
PTR-11-294830 The Martin Francis Schram Trust.

Appearances: Erica Shepard for Patricia Rice. Colleen Coen for Michael Cresta, Robert Cresta, Jeffrey Cresta and Mimi Johnson. Michael Dougherty for Douglas Johnson. Aaron Cohn for Saint Jude. Roger Gross Special Administrator in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shepard respresented to the Court that she has authority to appear on Mr. Vaught's behalf. Mr. Dougherty stated that mediation has not occurred and that discovery still needs to be conducted. All Parties agreed to a continuance date of June 11, 2013 to report on mediation and possibly set the matter for trial. The Parties do not agree to the Court granting Mr. Gross additional authority. Mr. Gross explained that he is doing the banking, maintaining the property, receiving various distributions from the IRA accounts and that he did the tax returns for 2011. The Parties are to cooperate in exchanging information. All three matters were continued to June 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Continued To Jan-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-11-294830 The Martin Francis Schram Revocable Living Trust.

Appearances: Gary Royce for the Cresta Siblings. Roger Gross for Douglas Johnson. Jon Vaught for Patricia Rice, Carol Burdette, Joanne Genevish, James Henderson and John Gerns.

All matters were continued January 11, to 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2011 Continued To Sep-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Brillant for Patricia Rice (Objector). Roger Gross and Gerhardt Stoll for Douglas Johsnon. Gary Royce for and with Michael Cresta (Objector).

The Parties stipulated to having all three matters consolidated into case number PES-11- 294526 (Estate of Alfred John O'Connor-lead case). The other two matters are PTR-11-294767 (Alfred John O'Connor Revocable Living Trust) and PTR-11-294830 (Martin Frances Schram Revocable Trust). Mr. Gross will prepare three orders consolidating the actions. The hearing dates of August 15th and September 7th are vacated. The Parties also stipulated to Mr. Gross acting as Special Administrator of the Estate with limited authority to marshall up to $25,000.00 in cash assets, to waive bond, to Mr. Gross having limited authority to contact financial institutions to gather information and to Mr. Gross opening a working Estate checking account for the purpose of paying past and recurring bills for the Estate. The Parties further stipulated that the powers of Douglas Johnson as Trustee of the O'Connor Trust are suspended without prejudice and that Douglas Johnson has no authority to administor the Schram Trust. The Parties are to prepare and circulate the stipulation, order and the letters. Mr. Brillant will file a petition for appointment of Trustee for the Schram Trust with a hearing date of September 14, 2011. The Court raised the issue of someone acting as Administrator not being allowed to also claim Attorney's fees without a Court order (Mr. Gross' fees). The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to September 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a status conference.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jul-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Claudia Lowder specially appearing for the Krustas (Nephews/Niece). Roger Gross for Douglas Johnson.

Ms. Lowder stated that they have not been retained yet but that it appears that they will be and requested a continuance. Mr. Gross spoke of the Schram Trust and stated that power of appointment was contained in the will. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to July 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court suggested exchange of information and stated that Mr. Andrade's declaration needs to be filed if he wants it to be considered.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To Jun-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeff Johnston Interested Party in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Johnston stated that he was told that there are about four witnesses that will state under oath that the currently assigned Administrator who is also the Sole Beneficiary of the will was not the intended beneficiary. The Petition for Probate of Will was continued to June 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Mr. Johnston that any Interested Party or Beneficiary that wants to object should file their papers, serve them on Mr. Gross and seek the assistance of an Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.
